Vecells SIM_FOUNDRY

Simulator Foundry Board

A contract-first backlog for unavailable, manual, delayed, or gated integration seams. The board ranks what to build now, how faithful each twin must be, and how each one later graduates, stays hybrid, or remains a permanent fallback.

Proof twins
